AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Tired of achy feet? Scholl Gel Activ Sport Insoles are a comfortable and supportive solution for active people. Shop now at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Prevent tired and achy feet with Scholl’s GelActiv Casual insoles, providing support for energetic feet.All day springiness & comfort for active people. Feel the GelActiv Difference.Which insole is right for you? Find out here! https://cdn-ec.wearefreakgames.com/SchollQuiz/masterTry GelActiv insoles risk free for 90 days!Visit www.scholl.com.au/moneyback for details on the Scholl 90 Day Money Back Guarantee offer.

Scholl’s new Gel Activ® insole range are made with revolutionary Gel Wave™ technology, that act like tiny springs to absorb shock and new top cloth designs to keep feet odour-free ,dry and cool all day.
Scholl are the experts in Footcare and the #1 Insole brand in Australia. Available in small and large sizes and now in sustainable packaging.


Specifically tailored for individual needs and shoe types there are 4 in the range.

Prevent tired and aching feet

Sport shoes - All day springiness & comfort for active people

Springiness

Shock absorption

Cushioning

Freshfeet top cloth to keep feet dry, fresh and cool all-day

Memory foam cushioning with GelWave™ conforms to your foot with every step.

Products.Name: Everfit 14FT Trampoline for Kids w/ Ladder Enclosure Safety Net Rebounder Orange
Products.DisplayName: Everfit 14FT Trampoline for Kids w/ Ladder Enclosure Safety Net Rebounder Orange
Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Everfit 14FT Trampoline for Kids w/ Ladder Enclosure Safety Net Rebounder Orange' has a supply limit of 36. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.

AdditionalAttributes.description:
Bounce to your hearts content with the Everfit Trampoline. With its superior bounce characteristics featuring 80-piece triple rate springs, the 14-foot Trampoline enables safe and durable bouncing with no worries. The heavy-gauge steel framework is designed to handle all robust play and is UV-tested for quality and reliability. Other great features include a curve design for more rigidness, 20mm thick padding, anti-graze mat, safety netting and a double-lock zip-and-clip entry. Not least, the included basketball hoop, basketball and pump really adds an awesome fun factor to the entire ensemble.

So jump to it and order the Everfit Trampoline today.

Safety note: Suitable for children aged over 6 years.

Features
14ft spacious trampoline
Heavy-gauge steel framework
Rust-proof marine-grade galvanization
Superior bounce and water resistance
Anti-graze mat with 5000hrs UV test
20mm thick UV-stabilized padding
Wide UV-stabilized spring skirt
Triple-rate springs
Enclosed safety netting
Safe double-lock zip-and-clip entry
Bonus storage compartments
Bonus basketball set

Specifications:
Frame: Steel marine-grade hot-dip galvanized
Rail padding: High density PVC & PE
Safety net: Polyethylene
Jumping mat: UV-resistant jump mat
Safety Posts: High density foam wrapped - ABS capped safety system
Ladder: Heavy galvanized steel
Max. weight capacity: 150kg
Numbers of legs: 4
Numbers of posts: 8
Posts/ Legs diameter range: 38*1.2mm thick
Frame tube diameter range: 42*1.35mm thick
Numbers of springs: 80
Spring length: 143mm
Trampoline diameter: 14ft/427cm
Overall height: 260cm
Height to mat: 80cm
Net height: 180cm
Number of package boxes: 3
Assembly required: Yes

Package Content
14FT trampoline x 1
Ladder x 1
Storage compartment x 1
Basketball set x 1
Ball pump x 1
Assembly maunal x 1

This product comes with 1 year warranty

  • Please refer to the "Estimated Delivery Time Frame" available in the product listing for the expected delivery time to your address

  • Note: Please provide a residential or business address at checkout. Deliveries to PO Box addresses or Parcel Lockers are not available

  • We ship across Australia, including major cities including: Sydney, Melbourne, Perth, Brisbane, Adelaide, Canberra, Newcastle and the Gold Coast

  • All products come with a minimum 1-year warranty, please consult with our customer service team for more information if needed.

Returns Policy

We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. We accept returns for Change of Mind (COM) on our products, provided the below conditions are followed:

1. We must be informed about COM within 14 days of receiving the goods

2. The product must be in its original packaging, unused and sealed

3. A 15% re-stocking fee and applicable freight fees will be charged for COM returns

4. Please contact our customer service team if you wish to return the goods

 

Please note that all returns must be directed through our Customer Service team. Please do not return or post items before obtaining instructions from us first. If you do, there is a risk that your returned item may not be identifiable and accepted.


We believe in our products and want to make sure you love them too, so please don't hesitate to contact us if you have any questions about our return policy.

Bundles.DisplayName: Everfit 14FT Trampoline for Kids w/ Ladder Enclosure Safety Net Rebounder Orange

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover BioPak Dinner Plates. A sustainable product made from plastic-free sugarcane, ideal for parties or takeaways. Add it to your cart at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
BioPak dinner plates are a sustainable, plastic-free option for those looking for a disposable dinner set. These disposable dinner plates are more eco-friendly than plastic dinner plates because they are made from sugarcane and other plant fibres. Each pack contains 20 sugarcane plates, perfect for convenient takeaway dinnerware or as party plates.


Quantity Details:

There are 20 disposable dinner plates in each pack.


Material Details:

Each sugarcane dinner plate is made from bagasse and other plant fibres. BioPak dinner plates are plastic-free, perfect for a sustainable dinner set.


Packaging Details:

BioPak dinner plates come in plastic-free paper packaging.


Composting Details:

These biodegradable spoons are suitable for home and commercial composting.


Food Safety Details:

Each BioCane dinner plate is microwave and oven-friendly.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Samba Natural Wooden Firelighters. A natural, odourless choice that won't taint food, ideal for BBQ or fire. Add it to your cart at Woolworths.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Samba 100% Natural Firelighters are non toxic, odourless and ideal for all firelighting applications. This makes these high performing firelighters perfect for firing up your charcoal BBQ, or indoor fireplace. Enjoy your next spring/summer charcoal barbeque without the concern of the firelighter altering the taste of your food. Feel the warmth of your indoor fire over winter, without any firelighter odour.
Whether you are lighting a barbeque, wood fire, coal fire or camp fire, you can trust Samba Natural firelighter cubes to help make the task quick and easy.

- Ideal for BBQ cooking, does not taint the taste of foods
- Clean Handling, simply break off and light
- Long Burn Time
- Non Toxic
- Odourless

AdditionalAttributes.Market.ProductTags: kids ride on car,electric ride on car,electric ride on toys,ride on cars,ride on toys,ride on cars for kids,12V battery,battery charger,christmas gift,birthday gift,children toys,rechargeable battery,remote control,outdoor indoor,Rigo,RIGO,sport,electric,toys,remote control,christmas gift,boy,girl,childrens toys
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Let your little one experience the excitement of driving a Rigo Range Rover-inspired ride on car. The steering wheel and acceleration pedals to control the forward and reverse movement give your child control and a realistic driving experience. It comes with some cool entertaining features that will allow your child to have hours of fun. It includes a safety seat belt and a remote control for parent supervision, making it the ideal choice for parents who want a safe and fun way for their children to explore their environment. The Rigo Range Rover-inspired ride on car is the perfect gift for any young car enthusiast.

Please Note:

1. Charge the battery on receiving even if it will not be used soon.

2. Charge the battery EVERY MONTH if not in use for long periods to prevent over-discharging of battery. This can cause irreparable damage to it.

Features
Brand: Rigo (Range Rover-inspired)
Lacquer finish
Keyless start engine control
Twin motors
Acceleration pedal
Lockable doors
Steering wheel
Forward and reverse operation
Two control modes: manual and remote (remote control included)
Horn
Built-in music
MP3-input music
Headlight
Tail lights
Flashing lights
4-wheel spring suspension
Safety seat belt
Anti-slip tyres
SAA-approved battery charger
EN71 Standard Safety of Toys certified

Specifications:
Age recommendation: 3+ years old
Loading capacity: 30kg
Motor: 50W (2 x 25W)
Speed range: 3-8km/h (depending on user weight)
Speed option: Slow/ fast
Seat belt: Adjustable
Remote control: Included
Remote distance: 20m (+/- 5m)
Remote Battery: AAA1.5V*2 (Batteries not included)
Operating hours: Up to 2 hours per full charge (depending on use)
Battery charger: Included
Charging time: 8-10 hours per full charge
Battery type: 6V 4.5AH
Battery voltage: 6V
Colour: Pink
Dimensions: 93cm x 45cm x 54cm

Package Content
Rigo Ride On Car x1
User Manual x1
Battery Charger x1
Remote Controller x1 (Batteries are not included)

This product comes with 1 year warranty.

  • Please refer to the "Estimated Delivery Time Frame" available in the product listing for the expected delivery time to your address

  • Note: Please provide a residential or business address at checkout. Deliveries to PO Box addresses or Parcel Lockers are not available

  • We ship across Australia, including major cities including: Sydney, Melbourne, Perth, Brisbane, Adelaide, Canberra, Newcastle and the Gold Coast

  • All products come with a minimum 1-year warranty, please consult with our customer service team for more information if needed.

Returns Policy

We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. We accept returns for Change of Mind (COM) on our products, provided the below conditions are followed:

1. We must be informed about COM within 14 days of receiving the goods

2. The product must be in its original packaging, unused and sealed

3. A 15% re-stocking fee and applicable freight fees will be charged for COM returns

4. Please contact our customer service team if you wish to return the goods

 

Please note that all returns must be directed through our Customer Service team. Please do not return or post items before obtaining instructions from us first. If you do, there is a risk that your returned item may not be identifiable and accepted.

Directions for Use
Meats should be thawed before cooking.
Suitable for electric and gas ovens.
Wash prior to use.

CAUTION
Not suitable for microwave ovens. Do not use on open flame. Do not over heat or over cook food items as oil, grease or food may catch on fire. Ensure trays does not make contact with oven walls or door. Allow minimum 10mm clearance around the tray. Always support base of the tray when in use. Always wear oven mitts when handling hot trays.

Brita Water Filter Cartridge
Maxtra Pro Pure... 3 pack

Products.SmallFormatDescription: Brita Water Filter Cartridge Maxtra Pro Pure Performance
Products.FullDescription: Brita Water Filter Cartridge Maxtra Pro Pure Performance

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Brita Water Filter Cartridge Maxtra Pro Pure Performance. An innovative product with 4-stage filtration for pure water. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
The innovative 4-stage filtration with natural activated carbon from coconut shells & ion exchanger pearls: filters impurities from certain herbicides, pesticides and pharmaceuticals & reduces taste-impairing chlorine and metals like lead & copper leaving you with pure & fresh water, full aroma in your coffee & tea and reliable limescale protection.

Always on the safe side with the MAXTRA PRO PURE PERFORMANCE: simply enjoy delicious, pure water from your tap - for cold drinking, hot drinks & cooking.

Twice as smart! With the MAXTRA PRO, BRITA offers you two water filtration experts: the all-rounder PURE PERFORMANCE & the LIMESCALE EXPERT for extra appliance protection with even +50% more effective limescale reduction than the PURE PERFORMANCE cartridge, specifically useful in regions with hard to very hard water.

BRITA provides sustainable drinking water solutions and is the world's No. 1 for drinking water filters. German Quality & Design - since 1966.

Product Features:

? Fits all BRITA Jugs & BRITA Flow: not only compatible, but thanks to the proven BRITA PerfectFit system your guarantee for a reliable & complete filtration.
? Increased filter capacity by +50% - filters up to 150L in 4 weeks to save even more plastic bottles.
? More sustainable than MAXTRA+: made from 50% bio-based materials (lid & barrel) and recyclable.
? Included: Replacement pack with 3x original BRITA MAXTRA PRO PURE PERFORMANCE filter cartridges

Bundles.Name: Brita Water Filter Cartridge Maxtra Pro Pure Performance
Bundles.DisplayName: Brita Water Filter Cartridge Maxtra Pro Pure Performance 3 pack
